reviews.review_msg: Could not ask for a funnier, smarter, or more understanding professor! Make sure you do all the reading/translations, and remember that participation matters.

Professor Hussey is one of the best profs I've taken a class with! Even if you're not interested in Medieval English, his passion for the subject is contagious. I found this class difficult but extremely rewarding. Highly recommend!

Truly no one is doing it like Matt. He is the funniest, warmest, most engaging professor I've ever had. He is tough but fair when grading essays, and very kind & accommodating. He loves his students so much and wants nothing but the best for them; he creates such a supportive environment. SFU is lucky to have him.

Extremely disorganized teaching style. While he is highly regarded in his field, his ability to convey material is hindered by frequent, inappropriate remarks that are entirely unrelated. Grading is inconsistent and lacks constructive feedback.

Matt is one of the best profs at SFU, hands down. He's super passionate and engaging, and he really cares about his students. This particular class requires you to really sink your teeth in to do well, but Matt is very encouraging and generous with bonus marks and the like. You will get out of the class what you put into it!
this class is hard, but hes an awesome prof. highly recommend. he is basically a stand up comedian.
Best. Prof. Ever. Genuinely super kind, always wants to help, and he's hilarious. He is so, so good and teaching and such a nice person. If you ever have the chance to take class with him, do it!
Amazing Prof. Very clear about what he wanted and was a straight-forward marker. Loved this class. It was definitely a lot of work but it was a great experience.

Professor Hussey was great! He gave excellent feedback (a paragraph response) to every paper & was clear on what was expected for each assignment. I would definitely recommend going to his office hours as he helps you narrow down your thesis (he likes specific) & gives extra insight on the topic and readings at hand.

I've taken 4 courses with Matt so far, and they have all been amazing. He's one of the best profs I have ever had. Everyone says how tough a marker he is, and that's true but he's so willing to help you, and his feedback is always great. Definitely recommend his classes but for students who are passionate enough and willing to put in the work.
